insight: Master Bot is described as 'pretty basic,' with community members implying it plays predictably and can be beaten with straightforward strategies. The specific question of whether Master Bot used Tia Threnody on itself (a self-sacrifice play) suggests it may misuse or trigger Tia Threnody incorrectly.
author: amalloy
context: Brief exchange about Master Bot's play quality and whether it made a Tia Threnody misplay.
